name: Local qBittorrent Review Queue
description: Local keyboard-first review workbench for completed torrent videos.
scene: One person sits at a desktop in a dim room, one hand on the keyboard, clearing completed downloads while avoiding accidental file loss.

typography.mono: IBM Plex Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace

rules: Red means Reject, delete, or failed destructive operation.
Amber means focus, capacity, or attention before action.
Preview and candidate files dominate. Decorative color does not.
